source_formula: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL]
notes: CRITICAL: Confirms user's doctrinal clarification — pixie is BOTH a set modifier AND a 2-ADD trick. Source structure ATW-like but with UPTIME dex (SAME IN [DEX] happens immediately after toe set, while bag rises). Terminal: OP TOE (opposite-leg). Distinct from ATW's MIDTIME ss-toe-terminal structure

source_formula: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] > SAME IN [DEX] > OP TOE [DEL].
notes: Two pixie-segments stacked. Source ADD=3 = pixie(2) + pixie(+1). Modern DB has terrage at 4 ADD AND terraging at 3 ADD — doctrinal divergence (see TD-1 in discrepancy queue)

source_formula: TOE > SAME IN [DEX] (JUMP) [BOD] > SAME INSIDE [DEL] > OP OUT [DEX] > (LAND)
